body.raw:
job type: PlanarJob
name: HelloWorld2
group: Demo
description: Demo Hello World Job hij
durable: true
concurrent: false
properties:
  filename: HelloWorld\HelloWorld.exe
simple triggers:
  - name: default_trigger2
    interval: 00:20:00
    misfire behaviour: FireNow
  - name: default_trigger3
    interval: 5:00:00
    misfire behaviour: FireNow

job type: PlanarJob
name: HelloWorld2
group: Demo
description: Demo Hello World Job hij
durable: true
concurrent: false
properties:
  filename: HelloWorld\HelloWorld.exe
simple triggers:
  - name: default_trigger2
    cron expression: 0 15 10 ? * MON-FRI
    misfire behaviour: auto
